sentences.arabic: تُنَظِّمُ مَرْيَمُ وَقْتَهَا بِشَكْلٍ جَيِّدٍ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Merjem svakog dana dobro organizuje svoje vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam organizes her time well every day.

sentences.arabic: تَبْدَأُ الْعَمَلَ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ لِتَكُونَ أَكْثَرَ إِنْتَاجِيَّةً.
sentences.translation: Počinje s radom rano ujutro kako bi bila produktivnija.
sentences.translationEn: She starts work early in the morning to be more productive.

sentences.arabic: تَكْتُبُ قَائِمَةً بِالْمَهَامِّ الضَّرُورِيَّةِ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَبْدَأَ.
sentences.translation: Piše listu neophodnih zadataka prije nego što počne.
sentences.translationEn: She writes a list of necessary tasks before she begins.

sentences.arabic: التَّخْطِيطُ السَّلِيمُ يُسَاعِدُهَا عَلَى تَوْفِيرِ الْجُهْدِ وَالْوَقْتِ.
sentences.translation: Ispravno planiranje joj pomaže da uštedi trud i vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: Proper planning helps her save effort and time.
